source: ILLUSTRATIVE reference rates (2026) — NOT live OEB data. Regulated Price Plan (RPP) prices are set by the Ontario Energy Board and change ~twice a year (Nov 1 / May 1). Verify against the OEB before relying on any figure: https://www.oeb.ca/consumer-information-and-protection/electricity-rates . The weekly refresh job (scripts/programs/refresh.mjs) overwrites this file from the OEB feed when it runs on CI.
oerNote: Ontario Electricity Rebate — an automatic pre-tax credit on eligible bills (~23.5% at time of writing).

windows.touNote: On-peak weekdays 7–11a & 5–7p; mid-peak weekdays 11a–5p; off-peak nights/weekends/holidays.
windows.uloNote: Ultra-low overnight 11p–7a every day; on-peak weekdays 4–9p; the rest weekend/off.
